title: SPONSORS ORGANIZED TO ASSIST REFUGEES - 211info
text: ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON SOAR PORTLAND SPONSORS ORGANIZED TO ASSIST REFUGEES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive and direct resettlement services, case management, and advocacy to help refugees build new lives. Also provides global and cultural education to help raise awareness in the community about refugees and the lives they were forced to leave behind. Volunteers needed for English language tutoring, transportation, and office assistance. 7931 NE Halsey Street Suite 302 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Individuals who are refugees Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 284-3002 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 284-3002 FAX (503) 284-3270 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Ukrainian, Burmese, Arabic, French, Serbo-Croatian AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Multicultural Education Refugee Resettlement Services Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - SOAR IMMIGRATION LEGAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON SOAR PORTLAND
